content.en:
Thundered!!!

Jin Chen Zhenjun fought with the Great Elder Yun Zhen, and the terrifying aftermath rushed to all sides, and even the battleship of the Panyun Xingyun family had to retreat so as not to be affected by it.

Even such a powerful warship could not withstand the attack of two galaxy-level powerhouses.

However, Ye Tian's side did not suffer the attack of the aftermath at all, even if the attacks of Jinchen Zhenjun and Yunzhen Great Elder escaped to this side, they would dissipate silently.

Yunchen glanced at Ye Tian curiously, and felt very strange, it seemed that there was a powerful force that protected this place, so that the impact could not spread here.

"Strange, could it be that His Highness Wanfa still has someone to protect?"

Yunchen thought to himself.

However, when he thought of Ye Tian's identity, it was not surprising.

After all, Ye Tiannai is the envoy of the town domain, and his status is second only to the status of the four overlord-level power leaders, that is, his status is second only to the god of the universe!

With such a big man, it is normal to have a galaxy-level powerhouse secretly protecting him!

It's just—

"Even a galaxy-level powerhouse can't silently erase the aftermath of the impact of the two galaxy-level powerhouses, right?"

Yunchen thought secretly.

It didn't take long for the battle between Jin Chen Zhenjun and Yun Zhen Great Elder to come to an end.

Great Elder Yunzhen's strength was much weaker than that of Jinchen Zhenjun, and even if he was desperate, it would be difficult to parry it for too long.

At this time, Grand Elder Yun Zhen was already seriously injured, and he couldn't compete with Jin Chen Zhenjun at all.

"Your Excellency, how about you stop here, our Panyun Xingyun family has galaxy-level power, and we also have the old nine-star power Sword Emperor Sect as a backer, if you kill me, you will be in great trouble!"

Grand Elder Yun Zhen hurriedly said.

He didn't think he was the opponent of Jin Chen Zhenjun, so he could only bring out the great backer of the galaxy-level power and the Sword Emperor Sect.

The strength of the Sword Emperor Sect is very strong, and it belongs to the top group among the nine-star forces, with a lot of galaxy-level powers, but it lacks a cosmic god, so it can't be ranked as a hegemon-level force.

In the domain, in addition to the four hegemon-level forces, other forces and strong people will basically give face to the Sword Emperor Sect, and the Panyun Xingyun family is next to the big backer of the Sword Emperor Sect, he believes that Jin Chen Zhenjun will definitely be jealous of the Sword Emperor Sect and will not kill him.

However, he was wrong!

Jin Chen Zhenjun is not a galaxy-level powerhouse in the disk domain, but a galaxy-level cultivated from the outer hall of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

Besides, he only listened to Ye Tian's words now.

If Ye Tian asked him to kill, even if Great Elder Yun Zhen was a person from a hegemon-level force or even a dominant-level force, he would kill him.

Rumble!!!!

Jin Chen Zhenjun shot the Great Elder Yun Zhen through his body, but he did not completely kill the Great Elder Yun Zhen, and the dying Great Elder Yun Zhen was brought to Ye Tian.

"Your Highness, I have already captured this person, what should I do, please make it clear to Your Highness!"

Jin Chen Zhenjun said.

Ye Tian didn't answer, but looked at Yunchen.

"Yun Lao, what do you think should be done with Yun Zhen?"

Ye Tian asked.

Yunchen hurriedly bent down and said, "Your Highness Wanfa, Yunchen was captured by your guards, how to deal with it, I don't dare to make the decision." "

"Well, since I promised to help you, I'll do good things to the end. Jin Chen Zhenjun, you take Yun Zhen, let's go directly to Panyun Xing!" Ye Tian commanded.

"Yes!"

Jin Chen Zhenjun nodded.

At this time, Yunchen panicked and said, "Your Highness Wanfa, you must not." Panyun Xing is the headquarters of the Panyun Xingyun family, there is a galaxy-level powerhouse in charge, and there are formations all over it, even if you are also a galaxy-level powerhouse, you don't dare to trespass there!

His ideal method was for Ye Tian to use his identity as a town envoy to mobilize manpower to the undead legion or the other three hegemon-level forces, so that he could easily suppress the Panyun Xingyun family.

However, Ye Tian was here to help him after all, and he didn't dare to order Ye Tian how to do things.

"Yun Lao, don't worry, I dare to go to Panyunxing, naturally I am not afraid of the Yun family!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

Seeing that Great Elder Yun Zhen was captured, the Yun family's warship attacked and tried to rescue Great Elder Yun Zhen.

But soon, Jin Jin Zhenjun pierced the battleship with a shot and destroyed it.

Then, Ye Tian secretly ordered a cosmic god to protect Sha Luo Xing, lest after they leave, the Yun family would destroy Sha Luo Xing, then his rescue would be meaningless.

......

Panyun Nebula Home.

In a glorious hall, an old man sat on a throne.

This old man is the star-level powerhouse of the Yun family, Allah of Drifting Rain, the head of the previous generation of the Yun family, and the current elder of the Yun family.

This time, after becoming a galaxy-level powerhouse by luck, he returned from behind the scenes, regained control of the Yun family, and prepared to lead the Yun family to attack the nine-star forces.

But now, his face was very gloomy, and the group of great god-level and galaxy-level elders below were all very frightened.

"Elder Taishang, is something wrong?Didn't you say that you would immediately attack the other Yun family branches, why did you suddenly stop your plan again?" a galaxy-level elder asked curiously.

"Something happened to Yun Zhen!"

Allah said with anger in the rain.

"What, something happened to Great Elder Yun Zhen? How could this be? Didn't he go to surround the Sha Luo Xingyun family, this should be just a very simple little thing!"

The others were puzzled and looked at Allah Rain, waiting for Allah's answer.

"Just now, there was news from the Shaluo galaxy that Great Elder Yun Zhen was captured, and I also tried to contact Great Elder Yun Zhen, but I couldn't get in touch, and the authenticity is very high. It is very likely that the other party will come to our Panyun Star, so I stopped the plan to attack the other Yun family branches. Those Yun family branches are not strong, they are just a plate of loose sand, and they might as well be annexed in the future. But Yun Zhen is the great elder of our Yun family, and he must not fall. Allah said solemnly in the rain.

The other elders nodded their heads in approval of the words of Allah in the rain.

After all, at present, they have already annexed some branches, and the remaining major branches are not to worry about, as long as they are given time, they will annex these branches.

But once the Great Elder Yun Zhen fell, the Yun family would suffer heavy losses.

"They're coming!"

Drifting Rain Allah's eyes seemed to look through the layers of void, looking into the starry sky, and muttered.

Whew!!!

One by one, the great god-level and galaxy-level Yun family powerhouses rushed out one after another, following Allah in the rain, preparing to face the upcoming enemy.

They were also very curious about who would dare to be the enemy of the Yun family at this time.

As for panic, that's no.

Raining Allah is a galaxy-level power, and he was once a peerless celestial power, his combat power is much stronger than that of ordinary star-level powers, and he holds an origin artifact.

It can be said that the combat power of Allah in the rain is very strong among the newly promoted galaxy-level powerhouses.

With such a galaxy-level power in charge, what are they afraid of?

----------

Coiled stars, in the distant starry sky.

Everyone in the Yun family appeared one by one, and Ye Tian's spaceship was also docked in this area, and the two sides confronted each other.

Crash!!!

The hatch opened, and Grand Elder Yun Zhen, who was seriously injured and dying, appeared, and Ye Tian, Yun Chen, Yun Xi and others also came out.

Seeing Ye Tian, the faces of many people in the Yun family changed slightly.

"Elder Taishang, he is His Highness Wanfa!"

A Yun patriarch reported to Allah of Falling Rain.

"His Highness Wanfa, it's the son of the universe!"

Allah's expression changed in the rain.

This is a little bad, the Son of the Universe is blessed by the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, and Ye Tiannai is the Highness of the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, although he doesn't know what the place is in the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, but even if he only has a little status, he doesn't dare to kill a Highness.
